testcase.name: testExternalApi
testcase.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\WINDOWS\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.14.15\byte-buddy-agent-1.14.15.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
